pageContext.name: Velociraptor Deluxe
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 Iron Studios statues line — Velociraptor Deluxe! Based on original references from The Lost World: Jurassic Park, this polystone Jurassic Park statue is hand painted and limited edition.   Jurassic Park collectibles fans, don't miss your chance to add Velociraptor to your Jurassic Park collection!
